tldr:
• Market RallyHope for US-Iran peace deal sparks market rally.
  • Digital PaymentsThe Clearing House launches bank-led digital payments initiative.
  • Crypto RegulationCFTC hires SEC crypto task force adviser with blockchain forensics expertise.
montis:
• FinanceHyperliquid Loses Markets as creator shuts down project. Ventuals, one of the teams behind real-world asset perpetuals on Hyperliquid, said it is closing its markets and joining another project in the ecosystem. 💡 Montis angle: This move may impact the overall liquidity of the Hyperliquid platform.
    ↗ Source June 15, 2026
  • BlockchainThe Clearing House Unveils Digital Payments Initiative to enable the clearing and settlement of tokenised commercial bank money at scale. The initiative is backed by major institutions and aims to improve the efficiency of digital payments. 💡 Montis angle: This initiative may pave the way for wider adoption of blockchain technology in traditional finance.
    ↗ Source June 12, 2026
  • CryptoCFTC Hires SEC Crypto Task Force Adviser with blockchain forensics expertise. The move is seen as a positive step towards regulating the crypto industry. 💡 Montis angle: This hiring may indicate a more proactive approach by the CFTC towards crypto regulation.
    ↗ Source June 15, 2026
  • DeFiBlockworks Features Building Trust in Onchain Capital Markets through its data and software platform. The company aims to provide consistent data models and repeatable analytical frameworks for onchain businesses. 💡 Montis angle: This platform may help increase transparency and trust in DeFi markets.
    ↗ Source June 15, 2026
  • FinanceBloomberg Markets Rally on Hope for US-Iran Peace Deal with comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the US market close. The rally is seen as a positive sign for the global economy. 💡 Montis angle: This rally may have a positive impact on global trade and economic growth.
    ↗ Source June 15, 2026
